title: Compositions and methods for visible-light-controlled ruthenium-catalyzed olefin metathesis
abstract: The present disclosure provides compositions and methods for metathesizing a first alkenyl or alkynyl group with a second alkenyl or alkynyl group, the composition comprising a ruthenium metathesis catalyst and a photoredox catalyst that is activated by visible light.
claims: 1. A composition for metathesizing a first alkenyl or alkynyl group with a second alkenyl or alkynyl group, comprising: (i) a ruthenium metathesis catalyst that is (SIMes) 2 RuCl 2 CHPh or (IMes) 2 RuCl 2 CHPh:
